idea-plugin.name: Namespace Mover
idea-plugin.description:
Automatically updates C# namespace declarations when a .cs file is moved to a different folder in JetBrains Rider.

Features:
  • Detects file move in the Project tree (drag & drop or refactor)
  • Calculates new namespace from RootNamespace in .csproj + folder path
  • Supports both file-scoped (namespace Foo.Bar;) and block-scoped styles
  • Replaces all namespace declarations in the file
  • Confirmation dialog shows old → new namespace before making any changes
